items.prompt: matches and generates equivalent linear-function representations across equation, table, graph, and verbal rule
items.expected_evidence: match or generate equivalent linear representations across equation, table, graph, verbal rule, and context
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves the same linear relationship accurately while moving among representations.

items.prompt: explains how slope, starting value, and covariation appear across representations of one linear function
items.expected_evidence: explain how constant rate of change and starting value appear in each representation
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the same function structure coherently across equation, table, graph, and verbal form.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to graph_equation_alignment_breakdown.
items.expected_evidence: determine whether a representation pair describes the same linear function
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies where the peer lost the shared linear relationship across graph and equation.

items.prompt: distinguishes linear functions from bounded non-linear or non-functional examples in less-familiar contexts
items.expected_evidence: distinguish linear-function representations from bounded non-linear counterexamples
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves linear-function meaning and rejects look-alike non-linear or non-functional cases.
